Content Editorial Systems What I've built
Systems

The work behind the work

Two systems I built to solve real editorial problems — designed for quality at volume, with human judgment at the decisions that matter.

01
System 01
The Content Engine
From Prototype to Revenue Infrastructure

I designed this system to solve a specific problem: how do you produce high volumes of quality curated content for a 240K subscriber brand without burning out your editorial team on search-intent production?

The original pipeline was five steps — UpContent for article discovery, LLM-powered prompting to analyse source content, identify editorial gaps and generate new angles, Airtable for tracking, and Google Docs for final editorial review. Built on Zapier. Live in production.

That prototype proved the model. With the right source material and a well-defined editorial brief on the front end, AI handles volume without sacrificing quality. It freed the team entirely to focus on original thought leadership and contributor programming.

With internal dev support, the system has since evolved into infrastructure powering content discovery for QZ.com — Redbrick's newly acquired media network. Content discovery now runs through News Catcher, pulling signals from thousands of credible sources. The workflow supports agent calls and has been extended to monetise content recommendations through pay-per-click affiliate. It's not just a production engine anymore — it's a revenue-generating content system.

Zapier Workflow — Content Ideation Pipeline V3
02
System 02
The Editorial Operations System
Contributor to Published — Automated End-to-End

The second system I built solved a different problem: how do you manage a growing contributor pipeline across outreach, pitching, onboarding, production and payment — with a small team and no room for things to fall through the cracks?

I architected a multi-board Asana environment with Zapier and Flodesk integrations connecting every stage of the contributor lifecycle. From the moment a potential contributor is identified, through application, pitch review, onboarding, article production, editorial approval and payment — the system routes, notifies and tracks with minimal manual intervention.

The design was intentional: human judgment at the decision points that matter (application review, pitch approval, editorial sign-off), automation everywhere else.

System Architecture — Contributor Lifecycle Mapping

Selected Work

What I've built

A career built at the intersection of content, technology and brand — with measurable results in fintech, AI and media.

Editor in Chief · Digital Entrepreneur · Redbrick

Building Digital Entrepreneur from concept to production

Redbrick, a portfolio of tech companies serving digital entrepreneurs, brought me in to create something that didn't exist yet: an independent editorial voice that could serve their entire ecosystem without feeling like branded content.

All I was given was a domain name, digitalentrepreneur.com. I shaped its philosophy, its visual identity and its editorial standards from the ground up, with the brand's narrative POV centering on entrepreneurs deserving content that addresses the whole of their lives, not just their KPIs.

Digital Entrepreneur is equal parts business intelligence and permission to do things differently for a community of 240K subscribers — and it's entering a new era as part of Quartz Media Network that will only expand its mission to reconnect entrepreneurs with the joy of business.

[ drop images/de-flatlay.jpg here ]

I crafted the visual identity and editorial voice of Digital Entrepreneur, shaping everything from the brand's design language to its founding philosophy.

NVIDIA
Digital Experience Manager

I was marketing AI in a time where consumer-facing use cases were still science fiction. At NVIDIA, I took their enterprise marketing from content to experience, using data to define and refine component libraries and page layouts. Ask me about the I Am AI campaign, where one simple change increased time on page.

Sama (Samasource)
Content Marketing Manager

On top of building the content programme that helped Sama communicate the complexity and value of machine learning data labelling to enterprise buyers, I led the development of a customer advocacy content series — a project that earned Sama the 2020 AI Breakthrough Award.

2× traffic
Generative Marketing
Organic search doubled in 12 months

Built a content-led demand engine for C2FO — a working capital platform — that doubled the share of organic search traffic in 12 months, overtaking email as the top channel. The Search Motivation Framework by former CMO of Databox worked beautifully here to close the gap between intent and action for FinTech decision makers.

49% lift
Fundbox
Content engine from the ground up

Consolidated 20+ independent contributors into a streamlined in-house content studio. 113 posts in 9 months, 49% lift in social-to-blog traffic and a +91 position jump on a primary keyword.

Capital Bank MD
Creative Strategist

Ran social content for Capital Bank MD's secured credit card and home loan products — translating complex financial products into accessible, trust-building content for consumers navigating credit and homeownership for the first time.

Content Planning Company
Chief Idea Officer

I operated as a Fractional CMO in my boutique agency turned marketing education consultancy. I worked primarily with founders and entrepreneurs to develop intentional content plans. I raised $15,000 on the iFundWomen platform to fuel it, and I'm most proud of programmes I developed for my audience like Digital Content Academy and Content Planning Parties.
